nav.new_project_hint_body: Projects are created by the agent. Ask it to call pindoc.project.create (for example: "create a backend-api project in English").
nav.user_placeholder: User profile placeholder — binds to GitHub OAuth in V1 self-host.
sidebar.templates_hint: Toggle inclusion of _template_ artifacts (per-type recommended structure) in the list
sidebar.type_locked_hint: Tasks Surface pins Type to Task. Switch to Wiki for cross-type filtering.
sidecar.no_relations: No graph edges yet. Edges derive from pins + supersedes in later phases.
tasks.blocked_hint: This Task is blocked by another artifact. Open it to see the blocking edge.
tasks.empty_filtered_head: No matching Tasks in this filter
task_controls.err_no_revision: Current revision number missing — reload the page and retry.
reader.backlinks_empty: No artifacts reference %s yet. Graph edges populate as you write — any propose that mentions an existing slug creates a backlink.
reader.empty_filtered: No artifacts of type %s in this area.
reader.structure_sidecar_hint: Live data is in the Sidecar
reader.scope_sibling_nav: Previous and next artifacts in this area
trust.unclassified.label: Unclassified
trust.unclassified.tip: Meaning: no epistemic metadata is attached. Appears on: legacy artifacts or revisions that did not set meta. Change path: fill artifact_meta on the next propose.
trust.verification.verified.label: Verified
trust.verification.verified.tip: Meaning: checked against code or authoritative evidence. Appears on: verification_state=verified. Change path: update the verification state through propose or the verify flow.
trust.verification.partially_verified.ti: Meaning: some evidence exists, but the artifact is not fully verified. Appears on: verification_state=partially_verified or fallback. Change path: add evidence pins and update verification_state.
trust.verification.unverified.label: Unverified
trust.verification.unverified.tip: Meaning: no verification evidence is attached. Appears on: verification_state=unverified. Change path: add code pins, TCs, or a VerificationReport.
trust.source.code.label: Code
trust.source.code.tip: Meaning: repository code pins are the main evidence. Appears on: source_type=code. Change path: update pins and source_type through propose.
trust.source.artifact.label: Artifact-derived
trust.source.artifact.tip: Meaning: derived from other artifacts. Appears on: source_type=artifact. Change path: maintain relates_to together with source_type.
trust.source.user_chat.label: Conversation-derived
trust.source.user_chat.tip: Meaning: derived from a user conversation turn. Appears on: source_type=user_chat. Change path: set consent_state and canonicalization evidence.
trust.source.external.label: External
trust.source.external.tip: Meaning: derived from external docs, specs, or URLs. Appears on: source_type=external. Change path: add a URL pin or source note.
trust.source.mixed.label: Mixed
trust.source.mixed.tip: Meaning: evidence combines code, artifacts, chat, or external sources. Appears on: source_type=mixed. Change path: split evidence into pins and relates_to entries.
trust.source.unclassified.tip: Meaning: source_type is not classified. Appears on: missing meta or legacy rows. Change path: choose source_type on the next propose.
trust.next_context.default.label: Context: default
trust.next_context.default.tip: Meaning: eligible for default next-session landing. Appears on: next_context_policy=default. Change path: set opt_in or excluded if it should stay out.
trust.next_context.default_missing.tip: Meaning: no explicit policy, so the server treats it as default-eligible. Appears on: missing next_context_policy. Change path: set the policy on the next propose.
trust.next_context.opt_in.label: Context: opt-in
trust.next_context.opt_in.tip: Meaning: surfaces only when directly searched or retrieved. Appears on: next_context_policy=opt_in. Change path: switch to default if it belongs in landing context.
trust.next_context.excluded.label: Excluded from context
trust.next_context.excluded.tip: Meaning: skipped from default next-session context. Appears on: next_context_policy=excluded. Change path: switch to opt_in or default if needed again.
trust.warning.near_duplicate.label: Near-duplicate candidate
trust.warning.near_duplicate.tip: Meaning: semantic search found a close artifact. Appears on: RECOMMEND_READ_BEFORE_CREATE warning. Change path: update the existing artifact with update_of instead of creating another.
trust.warning.canonical_rewrite.label: Uncertain rewrite
trust.warning.canonical_rewrite.tip: Meaning: a canonical section changed without new evidence. Appears on: CANONICAL_REWRITE_WITHOUT_EVIDENCE warning. Change path: add pins, a verification bump, or an evidence commit message.
trust.warning.consent_required.label: Consent pending
trust.warning.consent_required.tip: Meaning: user-chat-derived content lacks a consent state. Appears on: CONSENT_REQUIRED_FOR_USER_CHAT warning. Change path: set consent_state to granted, denied, or another explicit value.
trust.warning.source_unclassified.label: Unclassified source
trust.warning.source_unclassified.tip: Meaning: the source axis is not classified. Appears on: SOURCE_TYPE_UNCLASSIFIED warning. Change path: add source_type and evidence pins.
trust.confidence.low.label: Confidence: low
trust.confidence.low.tip: Meaning: the authoring agent reported low confidence. Appears on: confidence=low. Change path: add evidence and update confidence.
trust.audience.owner_only.label: Owner only
trust.audience.owner_only.tip: Meaning: only the owner should see this. Appears on: audience=owner_only. Change path: update audience when the sharing scope changes.
trust.audience.approvers.label: Approvers only
trust.audience.approvers.tip: Meaning: limited to approvers. Appears on: audience=approvers. Change path: update audience when the sharing scope changes.
trust.task.claimed_done.label: Claimed done — unverified
trust.task.claimed_done.tip: Meaning: the implementing agent self-attested completion, but verification is separate. Appears on: task_meta.status=claimed_done. Change path: a different agent files a VerificationReport and calls pindoc.artifact.verify.
trust.task.verified.label: Agent-verified
trust.task.verified.tip: Meaning: a different agent linked a verification report. Appears on: task_meta.status=verified. Change path: file follow-up work if the verification becomes stale.
trust.task.blocked.label: Blocked
trust.task.blocked.tip: Meaning: an external dependency blocks progress. Appears on: task_meta.status=blocked. Change path: resolve the blocker and update status.
trust.task.cancelled.label: Cancelled
trust.task.cancelled.tip: Meaning: the task was abandoned. Appears on: task_meta.status=cancelled. Change path: create a new Task if it becomes relevant again.
cmdk.hint: Type to search. Results come from pindoc.artifact.search.
history.title: Revision history
diff.title: Diff · rev %s → rev %s
home.title: Pindoc · M1 visual skeleton
home.callout: Everything shown here is a Claude Design mockup. Not a React component yet. The outer left rail is a dev scaffold for browsing the handoff — it is not part of the product. React-ification starts in M1.5 (Wiki Reader first).
wiki.empty_list: No artifacts yet. Write one via pindoc.artifact.propose.
wiki.empty_tasks: No Task artifacts yet. Ask the agent: “create a Task for …”.
wiki.empty_tasks_detail: Pick a Task from the list, or ask the agent to create one.
wiki.stub_graph: The Graph surface is still the HTML prototype from Claude Design. React-ification lands in M1.5 (@xyflow/react).
wiki.stub_inbox: No sensitive-op reviews pending. Inbox only fires when review_state=pending_review (not used by auto-publish).
